input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule IC.8.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ic.8.1
            TITLE: starter

            CONTENT:
            rule IC.8.1: Starter
IC.8.1 Starter 
Each vehicle must start the engine using an onboard starter at all times

final_answer: Each vehicle must start the engine using an onboard starter at all times
